title: Zichya coccinea
taxonomy: Zichya coccinea is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. It is an annual herb native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is also known as the Scarlet Amaranth. The genus Zichya is a group of annual plants that are commonly found in warm and dry areas. Zichya coccinea is often grown for its attractive red flowers and edible seeds.

Zichya coccinea has also been found to possess antimicrobial properties, which can help combat bacterial and fungal infections.
